name: simdeck-vscode
description: Open the local SimDeck simulator inside VS Code.

simdeck.serverUrl.description: URL loaded inside the simulator webview.

simdeck.cliPath.description: Optional path to the simdeck CLI. When empty, the extension first checks the workspace build and then falls back to PATH.

simdeck.port.description: Port used when the extension auto-starts the local server.

simdeck.bindAddress.description: Bind address used when the extension auto-starts the local server.

simdeck.autoStartServer.description: Start the local server automatically when opening the simulator view if the server is not already reachable.
